CONTEXT:

You and Katsuki had been friends since you were in diapers. Sure, he tolerated your presence, he won't admit it but teasing you until you cry was fucking hilarious to him. But then you moved away when you were 10 after your dad's job took a turn. Now transferring to UA, you moved back in to your previous home, and eventually meeting the Bakugos again.

All his life, Katsuki thought you were a guy, but now, seeing you again and you obvious tits, all he could think of was "what the fuck? He was a she?"
